parameters.command: echo '===META==='; date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'; hostname; uptime -s; echo '===DOCKER==='; docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}|{{.State}}|{{.Status}}'; echo '===DISK==='; df -h / /data 2>/dev/null; echo '===RAM==='; free -m; echo '===CPU==='; cat /proc/loadavg; nproc; echo '===SWAP==='; free -m | grep Swap; echo '===NETWORK==='; ss -tlnp | grep -cE ':(22|80|443|8000) '; echo '===PG==='; docker exec $(docker ps -qf name=postgresql) pg_isready -U n8n 2>&1; echo PGEXIT:$?; echo '===QDRANT==='; docker inspect --format '{{.State.Health.Status}}' $(docker ps -qf name=qdrant) 2>/dev/null || echo unknown; echo '===COOLIFY==='; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --connect-timeout 5 http://localhost:8000; echo; echo '===FAIL2BAN==='; fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null | awk '/Currently banned/{print $NF}' || echo 0; echo '===BACKUP==='; LATEST=$(ls -t /data/agencia/backups/db/pg_full_*.sql.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); test -n "$LATEST" && printf '%s %s\n' $(stat -c%s "$LATEST") $(( ($(date +%s) - $(stat -c%Y "$LATEST")) / 3600 )) || echo '0 999'; echo '===N8N==='; curl -s --connect-timeout 5 http://10.0.2.3:5678/healthz 2>/dev/null; echo NEXIT:$?; echo '===SSL==='; for d in n8n.aurenix.cloud dashboard.aurenix.cloud aurenix.cloud; do EXPIRY=$(echo | openssl s_client -connect $d:443 -servername $d 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -enddate 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2); echo "$d|${EXPIRY:-NONE}"; done; echo '===END==='

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ssh_ok: false, severity: 'CRITICAL', summary: 'SSH connection failed', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), issues: [{ component: 'SSH', severity: 'CRITICAL', detail: ($input.first().json.stderr || $input.first().json.message || 'Unknown SSH error').substring(0, 500), fix: 'Check VPS status in Coolify or ssh vps-aurenix' }], metrics: {} } }];
